issues: Indentation errors in compute_signal method cause logic to be unreachable or incorrect.
Mention counts are simulated as zeros, so mention spike condition never triggers as per spec requirement.
Volatility elevation logic uses vol_10d > vol_30d, but spec requires vol_10d > 30-day average volatility (correct), this is implemented correctly.
Exit condition correctly checks for 5 days or vol_10d < 0.8 * vol_30d, matching spec.
Adapter 'price_only' is correctly imported and fetch_prices used with correct kwargs and output column 'Close'.
Signal names RISK_ON/RISK_OFF/HOLD are acceptable as per instructions.
Allocation logic correctly assigns 5% per signal on RISK_ON and empty on RISK_OFF/HOLD.
Overall logic intent matches spec but code indentation errors and mention count simulation as zeros means no actual entry signal can trigger.
